tagline.en: The sunflower opened its face to the sun!
tagline.da: Solsikken aabnede sit ansigt mod solen!

theme.hero_task: Take a photo next to the open sunflower

tasks.action: Stand next to sunflower for a height comparison photo

prompt.en: Stand next to the sunflower -- is it taller than you? Take a photo!
prompt.da: Stil dig ved solsikken -- er den hoejere end dig? Tag et billede!

tasks.action: Harvest tomatoes, cucumbers, and peas from Bed C

prompt.en: The daily harvest round -- check every plant!
prompt.da: Den daglige hoest-runde -- tjek hver plante!

prompt.en: Still making strawberries! Keep picking the red ones.
prompt.da: Laver stadig jordbaer! Bliv ved med at plukke de roede.

tasks.action: Water all beds -- deep soak in hot weather

prompt.en: Hot weather deep soak! Count to 10 slowly at each bed.
prompt.da: Varmt vejr dyb vanding! Tael langsomt til 10 ved hvert bed.

tasks.action: Prepare vacation watering instructions for neighbor

prompt.en: Write simple watering instructions: which beds daily, how much. Leave by the beds.
prompt.da: Skriv enkle vandingsinstruktioner: hvilke bede dagligt, hvor meget. Laeg dem ved bedene.

growth_events.event: Sunflower head fully opened -- large golden face with brown center

prompt.en: The sunflower opened! See how it faces the sun? It's called a sunflower because it follows the sun!
prompt.da: Solsikken aabnede sig! Ser du hvordan den vender mod solen? Den hedder solsikke fordi den foelger solen!

growth_events.event: First small peppers forming on plants

prompt.en: See the tiny green peppers? They will turn red when they are ready!
prompt.da: Ser du de smaa groenne peberfrugter? De bliver roede, naar de er klar!

sowing_tasks.action: Sow eighth succession radish in Bed C
Sow sixth (final) succession lettuce in Bed E
